problem: Can ocean acidification be safely reversed — what biochemical approach?
hypothesis: Can ocean acidification be safely reversed — what biochemical approach? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Photocatalytic. Photocatalytic oxidation under visible light directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Field pilot deployment with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
